name: Venison Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steaks into serving portions.
2. Place the steaks in an electric frying pan.
3. Add water to cover the meat, then cook for approximately 10 minutes on each side.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and more water if necessary during cooking time.
5. Cook on low heat (175-200 degrees) until tender, which should take about one hour.
6. Turn the meat occasionally to prevent sticking.
7. This recipe can also be adapted for stove top, slow cooker, or oven cooking.
